column3: Move along, lass. Nothin' to see here.
Sorry, lass, but I've nothin' to sell till the next shipment comes.
You must progress further through the Shadowbringers main scenario in order to access this vendor's wares.
Once you have made a substantial contribution to the safety of Lakeland, Kholusia, Amh Araeng, Il Mheg, the Rak'tika Greatwood, and the Tempest, you will be able to trade with this vendor.
You're in luck, lass. Shipments of goods from all over are finally makin' their way to the Crystarium. If you're willin' to part with a few bicolor gemstones, mayhap we can strike a bargain.
You may now trade with Gramsol!
Collect bicolor gemstones to trade for a variety of goods.
Anything you fancy, lass? If you've bicolor gemstones to spend, I'm sure I have something you're after.
I am terribly sorry, miss, but I have nothing to sell at present.
I am terribly sorry, miss. A new shipment of wares is due any day now.
I have the most wonderful news! We've just received a shipment of goods to sell. Perhaps we have something to your liking?
You may now trade with Pedronille!
What will it be today, miss?
